title: Napkins Tulips 20 Pack 3 Ply Paper Ambiente Party Tableware Serviettes 16.5cm x 16.5cm
features: High quality 3-ply paper napkins by Ambiente made in The Netherlands with paper from responsible sources. FSC Certified
These party napkins are widely used for any kinds of occasions, such as birthday party, anniversary, hen party, wedding, family gathering, garden party, BBQ, and also great for daily use.
Each napkin measures 33cm x 33cm when unfolded and 16.5cm x 16.5cm when folded
description: Add some colour to your table with these high quality, 3 ply paper lunch napkins from Ambiente. Perfect for any occasion: parties, BBQs, anniversaries, dinners or just any get-together where you want to make an impression. Pack of 20. Each napkin measures 33 x 33cm when unfolded, or 16.5cm x 16.5cm when folded approx. Many other designs and holders available.
